title: eriocoma occidentalis subsp. occidentalis
intro: Eriocoma occidentalis subsp. occidentalis, a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States, is a member of the Poaceae family commonly known as needle grass. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Eriocoma occidentalis subsp. occidentalis include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and supporting overall gut health. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or using them in tea blends to harness its medicinal properties.
